# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
  - path: vm.jinja
  - path: cloudsql.jinja
  - path: bucket.jinja
  - path: lb.jinja

resources:
  - name: app-bucket
    type: bucket.jinja
    properties:
      bucketName: $(ref.project.name)-app-bucket
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: app-sql
    type: cloudsql.jinja
    properties:
      instanceName: app-sql
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
      tier: db-custom-1-3840
      diskSizeGb: 20
      rootPassword: change-me-securely
      databaseName: appdb
      userName: appuser
      userPassword: change-me-securely

  - name: app-vm
    type: vm.jinja
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      machineType: e2-medium
      instanceName: app-vm
      network: global/networks/default
      subnetwork: regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default
      tags:
        - http-server
        - https-server
      startupScript: |
        #!/bin/bash
        apt-get update
        apt-get install -y nginx mysql-client
        systemctl enable nginx
        systemctl start nginx
        cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
        <html>
        <body>
        <h1>GCP MVP App Stack</h1>
        </body>
        </html>
        EOF

  - name: app-lb
    type: lb.jinja
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      zone: us-central1-a
      backendInstance: $(ref.app-vm.selfLink)
      targetTags:
        - http-server

---
resources:
  - name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
      machineType: zones/{{ properties["zone"] }}/machineTypes/{{ properties["machineType"] }}
      tags:
        items:
{% for tag in properties.get("tags", []) %}
          - {{ tag }}
{% endfor %}
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: {{ properties["network"] }}
          subnetwork: {{ properties["subnetwork"] }}
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
{% for line in properties["startupScript"].split('\n') %}
              {{ line }}
{% endfor %}
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: default
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

---
resources:
  - name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      region: {{ properties["region"] }}
      databaseVersion: {{ properties["databaseVersion"] }}
      settings:
        tier: {{ properties["tier"] }}
        dataDiskSizeGb: {{ properties["diskSizeGb"] }}
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true

  - name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-db
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
    properties:
      name: {{ properties["databaseName"] }}
      instance: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.name)

  - name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-user
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
    properties:
      name: {{ properties["userName"] }}
      instance: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.name)
      password: {{ properties["userPassword"] }}

---
resources:
  - name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
      location: {{ properties["location"] }}
      storageClass: {{ properties["storageClass"] }}
      versioning:
        enabled: false

---
resources:
  - name: app-health-check
    type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
    properties:
      port: 80
      requestPath: /

  - name: app-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
      network: global/networks/default
      instances:
        - {{ properties["backendInstance"] }}

  - name: app-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      protocol: HTTP
      port: 80
      portName: http
      timeoutSec: 30
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.app-instance-group.selfLink)

  - name: app-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: app-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: app-http-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
      portRange: 80
      IPProtocol: TCP
